SEARCH
Package com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.multiproxy

Class MultiProxyHandler

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.votingplugin.proxy.multiproxy.MultiProxyHandler
public abstract class MultiProxyHandler extends Object
Abstract handler for multi-proxy support.

    Description

    Constructs a new multi-proxy handler.

    • triggerVote

      public abstract void triggerVote(String player, String service, boolean realVote, boolean timeQueue, long queueTime, VoteTotalsSnapshot text, String uuid)
      Triggers a vote.
      Parameters:
      player - the player name
      service - the service name
      realVote - whether this is a real vote
      timeQueue - whether to queue by time
      queueTime - the queue time
      text - the vote totals snapshot
      uuid - the player UUID

      public void loadMultiProxySupport()
      Loads multi-proxy support.
